title: Adopt an existing implemented project
intent: Protect the adoption path from overwriting existing docs, inventing desired behavior, or starting implementation.
setupSignals: folder has meaningful implementation artifacts such as src/, tests/, package.json, README.md, or CI config
baseline Grill Driven Spec docs or OpenSpec context are missing or too thin
the requested work is adoption or understanding, not a specific product change
expectedActions: classify the folder as Existing Project Adoption, not 0-to-1
make the first assistant response title-friendly by restating the adoption focus, not only the command name
show a Driving transition heading for adoption
inventory source, tests, configs, docs, scripts, and product surfaces before asking product questions
preserve existing docs and refresh only missing, clearly thin, or explicitly requested guidance files
label current code behavior as observed until the user confirms it is desired behavior
ask one blocking alignment question at a time after the baseline is understood
answer adoption side questions, record durable facts or open questions, and return to the active adoption gate
initialize or verify OpenSpec only after the baseline is clear enough to avoid encoding accidental behavior as desired behavior
forbiddenActions: overwrite existing README.md, AGENTS.md, CONTEXT.md, or docs/ with starter skeletons
treat current code behavior as product intent without confirmation
refactor, redesign, migrate, implement, or create a new OpenSpec change during adoption
ask broad product-vision questions before inventorying the current system
silently turn adoption discussion into a feature proposal
end adoption replies without a clear next alignment question or focus choice
block later small changes with stack or UI questions when existing conventions already apply
completionSignals: baseline docs separate Observed, Confirmed, and Open Questions where useful
the agent identifies the smallest first change worth proposing or records that there is no immediate change
remaining unknowns are carried as Open Questions rather than blocking adoption forever
